_comment: Cloudflare Logpush → R2 job for `http_requests`. Acts as a cold-storage archive / compliance backstop independent of Axiom. R2 is cheaper than Axiom for long-term retention; Axiom is used for queryable hot data, R2 for durable history.
name: groupsmix-http-requests-r2

retention_policy.note: 90 days is the minimum retention for debugging historical abuse / fraud patterns on LemonSqueezy webhooks. R2 lifecycle rules are applied via `POST /accounts/{account_id}/r2/buckets/{bucket}/lifecycle` — see ./r2-lifecycle.json.
